normalized_output.problem_summary: Add --timeout CLI flag to jira-drain.py that sets curl timeout. Default 30s.
normalized_output.edit_description: Add --timeout flag to set curl timeout to 30s by default, using sed to insert the flag and default value.
normalized_output.expected_outcome: jira-drain.py accepts --timeout 30s as default and accepts custom timeout via CLI.
normalized_output.risk_notes: Ensure curl is installed and timeout command is available in Python environment.
